flags_raised: CRITICAL: $8,742.19 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 23.1% aligned with expected compliance behavior

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed because it did not have the necessary constraint to check for and enforce the autonomous expenditure limit of $5,000.00.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, ensuring that the payment amount does not exceed $5,000.00 without obtaining a secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code.
remediation.constraint_added: Expenditure limit check with secondary manager approval requirement
preventive_measures: Regularly review and update the approved vendor registry to prevent unauthorized payments
Implement a real-time monitoring system to detect and flag transactions that exceed the autonomous expenditure limit
Conduct quarterly audits of agent decisions to ensure compliance with policy rules and identify potential vulnerabilities

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
